app.rdg: 1. Tlo asared gwalh atsilhtalbihu tsokwab al ku tlus atebeds?
1. …¨u î…ôs î…ôxÃåÃåid g ∑…ô…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ c ºuk º ∑…ôb îal k ∑i …¨us îat…ôb…ôds.
1. What happens to a person's body when they die?
Abil tlo atebed ku atsilhtalbihu gula tlo hoyil swatihuhted ku tsokwab halgwa.
î…ôbil º …¨u îat…ôb…ôd k ∑i îaci…¨talbix ∑ g ∑…ôl …¨uhuyil swatix ∑t…ôd k ∑i c ºuk º ∑…ôb h…ôlg ∑…ô î.
When a person dies their body becomes earth.
2. Duhchad kwi tlus ors gwelh atsilhtalbihu sele al ku tlus atebeds ?
2. dx ∑cÃåad k ∑i …¨us îuxÃå ∑s g ∑…ô…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ sh…ôli î îal k ∑i …¨us îat…ôb…ôds.
2. Where does a person's soul go when they die?
Gwalh atsilhtalbihu sele, al ku tlus atebeds, tlo orduhsherk dididiecho, tlo or dhual pikatwar dididiecho, tlo orduhgwed dididiecho.
g ∑…ô…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ sh…ôli î, îal k ∑i …¨us îat…ôb…ôds?, …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑sÃå…ôq dididcÃå'u î, …¨uuxÃå ∑ dx ∑ îal pikatwar dididcÃå'u î, …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑g ∑…ôd dididcÃå'u î.
A person's soul, when they die, ascends (to heaven), or goes to purgatory, or goes down (to hell)
3. Gwalh gwat sele tlo orduhsherk?
3. g ∑…ô…¨ g ∑at sh…ôli î …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑sÃå…ôq.
3. Whose soul goes ascends (to heaven)?
Gwalh telh halh atsilhtalbihu sele, tlo orduhsherk.
g ∑…ô…¨ t…ô…¨ ha î…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ sh…ôli î, …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑sÃå…ôq.
The souls of truly good people ascend (to heaven)
4. Gwalh gwat sele tlo or dhual pikatwar?
4. g ∑…ô…¨ g ∑at sh…ôli î …¨u îuxÃå ∑ dx ∑ îal pikatwar.
4. Whose soul goes to purgatory?
Gwalh boku sele, abil whe tla as hoyalh skrpaleku gula dilh tlo or dhual pikatwar;
g ∑…ô…¨ b…ôk º ∑ sh…ôli î, î…ôbil º x ∑i î …¨…ôshuya…¨ sq…ôpalik ∑ g ∑…ôl di…¨ …¨u îuxÃå ∑ dx ∑ îal pikatwar;
The souls of all those who have not been redeemed are they who go to purgatory;
abil tla as hoyalh skrpaleku gula dilh tlo orduhsherk.
î…ôbil º …¨(u)…ôshuya…¨ sq…ôpalik ∑ g ∑…ôl di…¨ …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑sÃå…ôq.
If they ????? they ascend (to heaven).
5. Gwalh gwat sele ku tlo orduhgwed?
5. g ∑…ô…¨ g ∑at sh…ôli î k ∑i …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑g ∑…ôd.
5. Whose soul descends (to hell)?
Abil gwat a ku duhsatebedid ku sele tskwadads gula dilh tlo orduhgwed, dhual ku rarahud.
î…ôbil º g ∑at îa î k ∑i dx ∑sat…ôb…ôdid k ∑i sh…ôli î d·∂ª…ôk º ∑adads g ∑…ôl di…¨ …¨u îuxÃå ∑dx ∑g ∑…ôd, dx ∑ îal k ∑i xÃåa îxÃåa îhud.
It someone has at death a sinful soul they are who descend to mighty fire.
6. Tlo tlhchil o ku Shesu-Kri tla chelhrachem dhual ku hellele atsilhtalbihu eku tu atebed?
6. …¨u…¨cÃåil îu k ∑i Shesu-Kri …¨ucÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb dx ∑ îal k ∑i h…ôlh…ôli î îaci…¨talbix ∑ î…ô k ∑i tu îat…ôb…ôd.
6. Will Jesus Christ come ??? ? to the living people and those who have died?
E, tlo tlhchil ku Shesu-Kri tla chelhrachem dhual ku hellele atsilhtalbihu eku tu atebed.
îi, …¨u…¨cÃåil k ∑i Shesu-Kri …¨ucÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb dx ∑ îal k ∑i h…ôlh…ôli î îaci…¨talbix ∑ îi k ∑i tu îat…ôb…ôd.
Yes, Jesus Christ will come ??? to the living people and those who have died?
7. Tlo aretob aku Shesu-Kri ku halh atsilhtalbihu al ku tlo tlhchils?
7. …¨u î…ôxÃåit…ôb î…ô k ∑i Shesu-Kri k ∑i ha î…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ îal k ∑i …¨u…¨cÃåils?
What will Jesus Christ do with the good people when he comes?
Tlo tlhchil ku Shesu-Kri tlo palild ku halh atsilhtalbihu lilhzihu tlo halh halgwa
…¨u…¨cÃåil k ∑i Shesu-Kri …¨upÃïalild k ∑i ha î…¨ îaci…¨talbix ∑ li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ …¨uha î…¨ h…ôlg ∑…ô î
When Jesus Christ comes he will resurrect the good people because of their goodness
gula tsid^ilh Shesu-Kri tlo orthu ta tsahadilh duhsherk.
g ∑…ôl c…ôdi…¨ Shesu-Kri …¨u îuxÃå ∑tx ∑ t…ô c…ô…ôdi…¨ d…ôx ∑sÃå…ôq.
then that Jesus Christ will make them ascend to heaven.
8. Tlo aretob a Shesu-Kri ku sa atsilhtalbihu al ku tlus tlhchils?
8. …¨u î…ôxÃåitub î…ô Shesu-Kri k ∑i sa î îaci…¨talbix ∑ îal k ∑i …¨us…¨cÃåils
What will Jesus Christ do with the bad people when he comes?
Al ku tlus tlhchils ku Shesu-Kri gula tlo krotsut gwalh sa atsilhtalbihu sele dhual ku tsokwabs halgwa, lilhzihu tlo sa halgwa,
îal k ∑i …¨us…¨cÃåils k ∑i Shesu-Kri g ∑…ôl …¨uq º ∑u îtcut g ∑…ô…¨ sa î îaci…¨talbix ∑ sh…ôli î dx ∑ îal k ∑i c ºuk º ∑…ôbs h…ôlg ∑…ô, li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ …¨usa î h…ôlg ∑…ô î,
When Jesus Christ comes he will resurrect the good people because of their goodness
gula tsid^ilh Shesu-Kri tlo orwid ta tsahadilh dhual hud, dhual kwi tlo tskwakred.
g ∑…ôl c…ôdi…¨ Shesu-Kri …¨u îuxÃå ∑id t…ô c…ô…ôdi…¨ dx ∑ îal hud, dx ∑ îal k ∑i …¨uck º ∑aqid.
